title: Cargo Demand and Fleet Supply Issues Continue
section_path: Cargo Demand and Fleet Supply Issues Continue
section_path_text: Cargo Demand and Fleet Supply Issues Continue
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Global crude steel production totaled 147.3 million tons last month. This is down month-on-month by 4.4 million tons (-3%) but is 1.6 million tons (1%) more than was reported last year for October 2021's production. Global crude steel production has now increased on a year-on-year basis for two straight months after previously contracting on a year-on-year basis for twelve straight months.
